assertions.title: Inventory valuation report with FIFO/LIFO/WA costing methods

steps.expected: All inventory valuation tests pass with 0 failures
steps.observed: InventoryValuationServiceTest: 7 tests passed, ReportServiceInventoryAndGstTest: 3 tests passed (1 inventory + 2 GST), TS_RuntimeInventoryValuationExecutableCoverageTest: 1 test passed. BUILD SUCCESS.

steps.expected: FIFO uses oldest available batches first, depleted batches skipped, totalValue=150.00
steps.observed: Test passes: depleted batch (qty available=0, cost=5) skipped, remaining batch (qty=15, cost=10) used. Total value asserted as 150.00.

steps.expected: LIFO uses newest batches first, totalValue=200.00
steps.observed: Test passes: newer batch (cost=10) prioritized over older (cost=5). Total value asserted as 200.00 for 20 units.

steps.expected: Period-level WEIGHTED_AVERAGE overrides item-level FIFO; value computed as weighted average
steps.observed: Test passes: accounting period with CostingMethod.WEIGHTED_AVERAGE overrides item FIFO. costingMethod='WEIGHTED_AVERAGE', totalValue=80.00.

steps.expected: Raw material uses weighted average cost from batch repository
steps.observed: Test passes: calculateWeightedAverageCost returns 3, stock=5, totalValue=15.00. findByRawMaterial never called.

steps.action: Verify as-of snapshot with movement adjustments (snapshotAsOf_appliesMovementAdjustmentsToStockAndValuation)
steps.expected: Historical snapshot adjusts stock by reversing post-date movements
steps.observed: Test passes: 2 receipt units reversed from current stock 10, yielding adjusted stock 8 and value 110.00, lowStockItems=1.

steps.action: Verify ReportService inventory valuation maps items and grouping from snapshot
steps.expected: inventoryValuation() correctly maps raw materials and finished goods with groupByCategory and groupByBrand
steps.observed: Test passes: 2 items (RAW_MATERIAL + FINISHED_GOOD), totalValue=180.00, category groups with correct values, brand groups with correct lowStockItems.

evidence.testResult: Tests run: 11, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0 — BUILD SUCCESS
testFiles: erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/reports/service/InventoryValuationServiceTest.java (7 tests: FIFO, LIFO, reserved stock, raw material WAC, WAC null fallback, period costing override, as-of snapshot)

assertions.title: GST returns report with CGST/SGST/IGST aggregation

steps.expected: All GST-related tests pass with 0 failures
steps.observed: GstServiceTest: 3 tests passed, ReportServiceInventoryAndGstTest: 2 GST tests passed. BUILD SUCCESS.

steps.expected: Same-state (27->27) yields CGST=90, SGST=90, IGST=0 for 1000@18%
steps.observed: Test passes: taxType=INTRA_STATE, cgst=90.00, sgst=90.00, igst=0.00, totalTax=180.00.

steps.expected: Cross-state (27->29) yields CGST=0, SGST=0, IGST=180 for 1000@18%
steps.observed: Test passes: taxType=INTER_STATE, cgst=0.00, sgst=0.00, igst=180.00, totalTax=180.00.

steps.expected: Missing source state throws ApplicationException
steps.observed: Test passes: ApplicationException thrown with message containing 'State codes are required'.

steps.expected: Report aggregates output tax from invoices and input tax credit from purchases, computes net liability, groups by rate, lists transaction details
steps.observed: Test passes: outputTax.total=18.00, inputTaxCredit.total=14.40 (purchase return adjusted: 18*(1-2/10)=14.40), netLiability.total=3.60. rateSummaries has 1 entry at 18% rate. transactionDetails has 2 entries (OUTPUT, INPUT).

steps.action: Verify GST return fallback to current period (gstReturn_withoutPeriodIdFallsBackToCurrentMonthPeriod)
steps.expected: When periodId is null, report uses current month period
steps.observed: Test passes: periodId=31 from current month lookup. Empty invoices/purchases yield zeros. rateSummaries empty, netLiability.total=0.00.

evidence.testResult: Tests run: 6, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0 — BUILD SUCCESS
testFiles: erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/accounting/service/GstServiceTest.java (3 tests: intra-state split, inter-state IGST, state code validation)

erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/reports/service/ReportServiceInventoryAndGstTest.java (2 GST tests: full aggregation with rate summaries + transaction details, period fallback)

steps.expected: Complete documentation: all available reports, parameters, response formats, chart/visualization hints

steps.expected: All report endpoints documented with HTTP method, path, query params, response schema

steps.expected: Step-by-step API call sequences for each report type
steps.observed: 6 user flows documented: Trial Balance (period/range with comparative), Profit & Loss (comparative view), Balance Sheet (sectioned + equation check), Aged Debtors (bucket analysis), Inventory Valuation (costing method aware), GST Return (period filing worksheet).

steps.expected: Key request/response DTOs with field descriptions

steps.expected: Module-specific error codes with frontend handling guidance

steps.expected: UI hints for chart/visualization rendering
steps.observed: Comprehensive visualization hints section covers: Trial Balance (sortable grid), P&L (hierarchical statement tree), Balance Sheet (T-account layout), Aged Debtors (stacked bar chart), Inventory Valuation (sortable table + grouped panels), GST Return (section-wise filing cards + rate table + annexure).

steps.expected: Export format support documented

steps.expected: Report refresh sequences tied to business operations
steps.observed: 4 cross-module flow playbooks documented: O2C->reports, P2P->reports, Manufacturing->reports, Payroll->reports. Each includes which reports to refresh after operations.

steps.expected: Login, logout, MFA, password reset flows documented
steps.observed: 5 flows documented: Login without MFA, Login with MFA challenge (428 Precondition Required), MFA enrollment, Password reset, Token refresh.

steps.expected: Token handling details documented
steps.observed: JWT Token Handling section covers: access token claims, refresh token rotation, logout behavior (single token vs all tokens), token/company consistency, X-Company-Code enforcement, storage strategy, expiry handling.

steps.expected: Auth error codes with frontend behavior
steps.observed: 10 error codes documented: AUTH_001, AUTH_003, AUTH_004, AUTH_005, AUTH_007, AUTH_008, VAL_001, VAL_002, VAL_007 with specific frontend behavior guidance.

steps.expected: Frontend implementation guidance
steps.observed: UI hints cover: password strength indicator, confirm password validation, mustChangePassword redirect, MFA QR code rendering, recovery codes display, generic forgot-password UX, tenant selector input.

assertions.title: Tenant and admin module documented in frontend-handoff.md

steps.expected: Complete tenant/admin documentation: superadmin dashboard, tenant onboarding, module gating, user management, state machines, error codes
steps.observed: Tenant & Admin section found (lines ~231-450). Contains all required documentation elements.

steps.expected: All tenant/admin endpoints documented
steps.observed: 3 endpoint categories documented: (A) Superadmin tenant control (10 endpoints), (B) Tenant admin user management (10 endpoints), (C) Tenant-selection context (2 endpoints). Total: 22 endpoints.

steps.expected: Gatable modules, enforcement behavior, path mapping
steps.observed: Module Feature Gating section covers: gatable modules (MANUFACTURING, HR_PAYROLL, PURCHASING, PORTAL, REPORTS_ADVANCED), core modules (AUTH, ACCOUNTING, SALES, INVENTORY), 403+BUS_010 error for disabled modules, runtime path mapping for each module.

steps.expected: Key tenant/admin flows documented
steps.observed: 4 flows documented: Platform login->tenant selection->module access, Superadmin tenant creation with CoA template, User creation with role assignment, Tenant lifecycle operations.

steps.expected: Tenant and user lifecycle state machines
steps.observed: 2 state machines documented: Tenant lifecycle (ACTIVE->SUSPENDED->DEACTIVATED with transitions), Admin user lifecycle (ENABLED->SUSPENDED->DELETED, MFA states).

steps.expected: Tenant/admin error codes
steps.observed: 6 error codes/conditions documented: AUTH_004, BUS_010, VAL_001, VAL_007, 403 suspended, 403 deactivated, 401.

steps.expected: All DTOs documented
steps.observed: 17 DTOs documented: SuperAdminDashboardDto, SuperAdminTenantDto, SuperAdminTenantUsageDto, CompanyLifecycleStateRequest/Dto, TenantModulesUpdateRequest, CompanyEnabledModulesDto, CoATemplateDto, TenantOnboardingRequest/Response, CreateUserRequest, UpdateUserRequest, UserDto, CreateRoleRequest, RoleDto, PermissionDto, SwitchCompanyRequest, CompanyDto.

steps.expected: Frontend guidance for tenant/admin screens
steps.observed: UI hints cover: tenant selector dropdown, module configuration checkboxes, user creation form, CoA template cards, onboarding password handling, lifecycle mutation confirmations.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. VAL-RPT-005 (Inventory Valuation) validated via 11 unit tests covering FIFO/LIFO/WA costing, reserved stock, raw materials, period overrides, and as-of snapshots. VAL-RPT-006 (GST Returns) validated via 6 unit tests covering intra/inter-state tax splitting, aggregation with rate summaries, transaction details, and period fallback. VAL-DOC-008 (Reports docs) validated via inspection confirming complete endpoint map (15 endpoints), 6 user flows, 13 DTOs, visualization hints, export matrix, and cross-module playbooks. VAL-DOC-001 (Auth docs) validated via inspection confirming 13 endpoints, 5 flows, JWT handling, 10 error codes, 12 DTOs, and UI hints. VAL-DOC-002 (Tenant/Admin docs) validated via inspection confirming 22 endpoints, 4 flows, 2 state machines, 17 DTOs, module gating, and UI hints.
